hands.description: NN EEE 2020 WWW SS (1 suit, concealed)
111 22 333 DDD DDD (3 suits, 3 consecutive numbers, Pungs-Opp. Dragons, concealed)
FFFFF DDDD 11111 (any no. in any suit, red dragon)
FFFFF DDDD 11111 (any no. in any suit, green dragon)
FFFFF DDDD 11111 (any no. in any suit, white dragon)
NN EE WW SS 11 22 33 (1 suit, any 3 consec. nos., concealed)
FF 11 22 33 44 55 DD (1 suit, any 5 consec. nos., concealed)
FF 11 22 11 22 11 22 (any 3 suits, any 2 consec. pairs, concealed)
FF 2020 NEWS 2020 (any 2 suits, 2s match in each 2020, concealed)
FF DDDD NEWS DDDD (Kongs - any 2 dragons)
NNNN 11 11 11 SSSS (Any like odd nos. in 3 suits)
EEEE 22 22 22 WWWW (Any like even nos. in 3 suits)
NN EEE DDDD WWW SS (Kong any dragon)
